title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/03/2025
Today, DCE Iron ore futures fluctuated downward throughout the day. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 779.5, with a daily gainof 2.43%. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling; steel mills were cautious and observant, with some mills experiencing moderate sales of finished products and actively restocking; market transaction sentiment was average.
